<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Bi-monthly Garden Subscription](30-bimonthly-garden.jpg)

Built for plant people rather than bouquet people. Every two months: a houseplant we think you'll love, or a mixed pack of cuttings ready to root, or an alternating mix.

## What's in it

- A potted plant or a cutting pack
- Care card per delivery
- Six deliveries per year

## Care

Each delivery's care card stays with the plant for reference.
